title: Mastering `font-display` for Flawless Web Font Loading & UI Stability
tweet: Stop layout shifts! 🚀 Learn how `font-display` revolutionizes web font loading for superior #UIDesign & #UserExperience. A must-read for #CSSTypography pros. #WebFonts
tip: Optimize font loading by strategically choosing `font-display` values. For most body text, `swap` ensures quick content visibility. For critical brand fonts or icons, consider `fallback` or `optional` combined with `<link rel="preload">` to minimize render-blocking and avoid flashes of unstyled text (FOUT) or invisible text (FOIT), boosting perceived performance and UI stability.
